verdict: METHOD ROBUST via PERSISTENCE: the persistence-sensitive large window localizes the transition robustly across paradigm strength (>= 15/15 at every ratio, including the adversarial ratio 1 where the fragile pointwise detector gets 11/15) AND across fluctuation persistence -- degrading only mildly to 13/15 when spontaneous bursts approach the window length (100 vs window 120). A+B+C stopping rule: the localization failure (5/15) is resolved by a large, persistence-sensitive window -- NOT by a multiscale bank (Exp A: no gain over a single large window) and NOT by covariate smoothing (Exp B: degrades it). The residual risk is a spontaneous structural burst LONGER than the analysis window, which would look permanent within it; that is the one regime still needing a permanence-to-record-end test. Ready for a confirmatory pre-registration; real-EEG confirmation still needs PhysioNet.
